title: URAファイナルズ準決勝の後に

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! With this win in the semi-finals,
you've earned yourself a spot in the finals!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in your trainee's passionate
race, I completely forgot about my work.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this incredible result is thanks to your
firm bond with your trainee.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any words for her going into the
final race?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Simply amazing! What strength of feeling
contained in such simple words!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! You've got what it takes! You'd do
anything for victory! Even spending all your
savings on a reward for your trainee!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
What stirring determination! I'm looking forward
to seeing you in the finals!
